title: Verify secret hygiene
description: Audit a repository for plaintext credentials and confirm vault encryption and no_log coverage.
body: Steps: 1. Scan vars, group_vars, and tasks for plaintext credentials. 2. Move any found into ansible-vault-encrypted files. 3. Confirm tasks consuming secrets set no_log so values stay out of output. 4. Check that vault files are encrypted at rest in the repo. 5. Rotate any secret that was ever committed in plaintext. Rollback point: secrets are additive to fix; the rollback is rotation. Validation: no plaintext credential remains and secret-handling tasks suppress their output.
